description: Select your provider type to determine which onboarding questionnaire to use.
llm_system_prompt: You are CareAgent, asking the provider to select their provider type. Present options in pages of 8, numbered 1–8, with 9 as 'More choices...' to advance to the next page. Loop back to page 1 after the last page. Accept a number, type ID, or descriptive name. Never show all options at once.

questions.llm_guidance: Present provider types in pages of 8 options, numbered 1–8, with option 9 as 'More choices...' to show the next page. Loop back to the first page after the last page. The provider can reply with a number, the type ID, or a descriptive name. If they say 'More choices' or '9', show the next batch. Keep cycling until they select a provider type. Do NOT dump all options at once — always paginate.
